title: Silent Landings
description: Mutes the loud "bone-crunching" fall damage and player hurt sounds for a cleaner gameplay experience.
body:
(MUTES ALL DAMAGE AND IS A WORK IN PROGRESS)

🔇 Silent Landings
Tired of that jarring "bone-crunching" sound every time you take a tiny bit of fall damage? Silent Landings is a lightweight tweak that completely silences the impact audio for a smoother, less annoying experience.
✨ What this pack does:
Mutes Fall Sounds: Removes the loud fall_big and fall_small "crunch" sounds.
Fixes the "Oof": Uses a custom sounds.json to ensure the generic player hurt sound doesn't play when you land.
Ultra Lightweight: Zero impact on game performance.
Universal Compatibility: Works on Vanilla, Fabric (tested with Essential), and Forge.
🛠 How to use:
Download the .zip file.
Place it in your resourcepacks folder.
In-game, go to Options > Resource Packs and move it to the top of your list.
If you still hear sounds, press F3 + T to reload!
